requirement_topic.en: ErP / Ecodesign — Energy Performance Requirements for Heat Pumps
requirement_topic.zh: ErP / 生态设计——热泵能效性能要求
requirement_topic.zht: ErP / 生態設計——熱泵能效性能要求

summary.en: Turkey has adopted the EU Ecodesign Regulation 2016/2281 (equivalent) covering space heaters and combination heaters including heat pumps. This sets minimum seasonal energy performance requirements (SCOP for heating, SEER for cooling where applicable). Products must meet the prescribed minimum efficiency thresholds before CE marking can be affixed. Testing must be conducted to EN 14511 / EN 14825 (seasonal) methods. Ecodesign non-compliance is a bar to market entry independent of the energy label.
summary.zh: 土耳其已采用欧盟生态设计法规2016/2281等效版本，涵盖包括热泵在内的空间加热器和组合加热器。该法规规定了最低季节性能效要求（供暖SCOP、适用时制冷SEER）。产品须满足规定的最低效率门槛，方可加贴CE标志。测试须按EN 14511 / EN 14825（季节性）方法进行。不符合生态设计要求本身即构成市场准入障碍，与能效标识相互独立。
summary.zht: 土耳其已採用歐盟生態設計法規2016/2281等效版本，涵蓋包括熱泵在內的空間加熱器和組合加熱器。該法規規定了最低季節性能效要求（供暖SCOP、適用時製冷SEER）。產品須滿足規定的最低效率門檻，方可加貼CE標誌。測試須按EN 14511 / EN 14825（季節性）方法進行。不符合生態設計要求本身即構成市場准入障礙，與能效標識相互獨立。

standards_or_laws: Turkey equivalent of EU Regulation 2016/2281 (Ecodesign for space heaters and combination heaters)
EN 14511 — Air conditioners, liquid chilling packages and heat pumps (test method)
EN 14825 — Air conditioners, liquid chilling packages and heat pumps (seasonal efficiency testing)

summary.en: Chinese heat pumps are tested to GB/T 7725 for COP and SCOP under domestic Chinese efficiency standards. The China Energy Label uses a 1–5 star scale under GB 21454. Efficiency metrics and test conditions differ from EN 14511 / EN 14825, and the Chinese label scale and thresholds are not equivalent to the EU/Turkey A+++ energy label system.
summary.zh: 中国热泵按GB/T 7725测试COP和SCOP，按中国内销能效标准评定。中国能效标识采用GB 21454下的1–5星评级。效率指标和测试条件与EN 14511 / EN 14825不同，中国标识的评级和门槛与欧盟/土耳其A+++能效标识体系不等同。
summary.zht: 中國熱泵按GB/T 7725測試COP和SCOP，按中國內銷能效標準評定。中國能效標識採用GB 21454下的1–5星評級。效率指標和測試條件與EN 14511 / EN 14825不同，中國標識的評級和門檻與歐盟/土耳其A+++能效標識體系不等同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7725 — Room air conditioners and heat pumps (COP/SCOP test method)
GB 21454 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and grades for multi-split heat pumps

gap.en: Chinese efficiency test data (GB/T 7725, COP/SCOP at Chinese reference conditions) cannot be directly used to demonstrate compliance with ErP Regulation 2016/2281 thresholds. Re-testing to EN 14511 / EN 14825 at EN reference conditions is required. The China 1–5 star label is not equivalent to the A+++ EU/Turkey label and cannot substitute for it.
gap.zh: 中国效率测试数据（GB/T 7725，中国参考条件下的COP/SCOP）不能直接用于证明符合ErP法规2016/2281门槛。须按EN 14511 / EN 14825在EN参考条件下重新测试。中国1–5星标识与A+++欧盟/土耳其标识不等同，不能替代。
gap.zht: 中國效率測試數據（GB/T 7725，中國參考條件下的COP/SCOP）不能直接用於證明符合ErP法規2016/2281門檻。須按EN 14511 / EN 14825在EN參考條件下重新測試。中國1–5星標識與A+++歐盟/土耳其標識不等同，不能替代。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ErP minimum efficiency thresholds are a prerequisite for CE marking; non-compliant products cannot be placed on the Turkish market
mandatory_status.cn: China Energy Label and GB efficiency grades mandatory for China domestic market; not valid for Turkey

source.publisher: European Commission (Regulation 2016/2281, adopted by Turkey via Presidential Decree)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — EN 14511 / EN 14825 re-testing to EU ErP thresholds is required; Chinese GB efficiency data is not transferable. Products must meet minimum SCOP/SEER thresholds before CE marking.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——须按EU ErP门槛重新进行EN 14511 / EN 14825测试；中国GB能效数据不可直接移用。产品须满足最低SCOP/SEER门槛，方可取得CE标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——須按EU ErP門檻重新進行EN 14511 / EN 14825測試；中國GB能效數據不可直接移用。產品須滿足最低SCOP/SEER門檻，方可取得CE標誌。

requirement_topic.en: EU-Aligned Energy Label (A+++ Scale) — Mandatory Display on Heat Pumps
requirement_topic.zh: 欧盟对齐能效标识（A+++级）——热泵强制展示
requirement_topic.zht: 歐盟對齊能效標識（A+++級）——熱泵強制展示

summary.en: Turkey requires the EU-aligned energy label (A+++ to D or G scale depending on product category) on heat pump space heaters and combination heaters placed on the market. The label must display the seasonal space heating energy efficiency class (SCOP-derived), noise level (where applicable), and rated output. Labels must be in Turkish or at minimum show the EU-format graphical label. The label is derived from the ErP product database (EPREL equivalent) values and must be generated from EN 14825 seasonal test results.
summary.zh: 土耳其要求在上市销售的热泵空间加热器和组合加热器上展示欧盟对齐的能效标识（根据产品类别为A+++至D或G级）。标识须展示季节性空间加热能效等级（源自SCOP）、噪声等级（适用时）和额定功率。标识须使用土耳其语，或至少采用欧盟格式图形标识。标识值源自ErP产品数据库（相当于EPREL）注册数据，须根据EN 14825季节性测试结果生成。
summary.zht: 土耳其要求在上市銷售的熱泵空間加熱器和組合加熱器上展示歐盟對齊的能效標識（根據產品類別為A+++至D或G級）。標識須展示季節性空間加熱能效等級（源自SCOP）、噪聲等級（適用時）和額定功率。標識須使用土耳其語，或至少採用歐盟格式圖形標識。標識值源自ErP產品數據庫（相當於EPREL）登記數據，須根據EN 14825季節性測試結果生成。

standards_or_laws: Turkey equivalent of EU Energy Labelling Regulation 2017/1369
EU Delegated Regulation 2016/2281 product fiche and label requirements
EN 14825 — seasonal energy efficiency calculation method

summary.en: China's domestic energy label (1–5 star, administered by CNCA / NEA) uses a different scale, different reference conditions, and different product classification criteria than the EU A+++ label. The China Energy Label is displayed on Chinese domestic products per GB 21455 and related standards. It is not compatible with the EU/Turkey A+++ label format or regulatory submission.
summary.zh: 中国内销能效标识（1–5星，由CNCA/国家能源局管理）采用与欧盟A+++标识不同的评级体系、参考条件和产品分类标准。中国能效标识按GB 21455等相关标准展示在内销产品上，与欧盟/土耳其A+++标识格式及监管申报不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國內銷能效標識（1–5星，由CNCA/國家能源局管理）採用與歐盟A+++標識不同的評級體系、參考條件和產品分類標準。中國能效標識按GB 21455等相關標準展示在內銷產品上，與歐盟/土耳其A+++標識格式及監管申報不相容。

standards_or_laws: GB 21455 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency for room air conditioners

gap.en: The Chinese 1–5 star energy label cannot be used in Turkey. Manufacturers must generate an EU-format A+++ energy label from EN 14825 seasonal test data, register product data in the applicable Turkish or EU EPREL-equivalent product database, and display the label at point of sale and in product documentation. This is a separate obligation from meeting the ErP minimum efficiency thresholds.
gap.zh: 中国1–5星能效标识不能在土耳其使用。制造商须根据EN 14825季节性测试数据生成欧盟格式A+++能效标识，在适用的土耳其或欧盟EPREL等效产品数据库中登记产品数据，并在销售点和产品文件中展示标识。这是独立于满足ErP最低效率门槛之外的义务。
gap.zht: 中國1–5星能效標識不能在土耳其使用。製造商須根據EN 14825季節性測試數據生成歐盟格式A+++能效標識，在適用的土耳其或歐盟EPREL等效產品資料庫中登記產品數據，並在銷售點和產品文件中展示標識。這是獨立於滿足ErP最低效率門檻之外的義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — A+++ EU-format energy label required for heat pump space heaters placed on the Turkish market
mandatory_status.cn: China Energy Label mandatory for China domestic market; not valid for Turkey

source.publisher: European Commission (Energy Labelling Regulation 2017/1369, adopted by Turkey via Presidential Decree)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — An EU-format A+++ energy label generated from EN 14825 seasonal test results is mandatory; the Chinese 1–5 star label is not transferable to Turkey.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——须根据EN 14825季节性测试结果生成欧盟格式A+++能效标识；中国1–5星标识不可移用至土耳其。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——須根據EN 14825季節性測試結果生成歐盟格式A+++能效標識；中國1–5星標識不可移用至土耳其。
